Bash(# Remove unused database_helper.dart imports from Repository pattern files
files_to_fix=(
  "/mnt/c/Users/Administrator/AndroidStudioProjects/rufko/lib/data/database/email_template_database.dart"
  "/mnt/c/Users/Administrator/AndroidStudioProjects/rufko/lib/data/database/inspection_document_database.dart"
  "/mnt/c/Users/Administrator/AndroidStudioProjects/rufko/lib/data/database/message_template_database.dart"
  "/mnt/c/Users/Administrator/AndroidStudioProjects/rufko/lib/data/database/pdf_template_database.dart"
  "/mnt/c/Users/Administrator/AndroidStudioProjects/rufko/lib/data/database/project_media_database.dart"
  "/mnt/c/Users/Administrator/AndroidStudioProjects/rufko/lib/data/database/roof_scope_database.dart"
)

for file in "${files_to_fix[@]}"; do
  echo "Removing unused database_helper import from $(basename $file)"
  sed -i "/import 'database_helper\.dart';/d" "$file"
done

echo "✅ Removed unused database_helper.dart imports from Repository pattern files")
